title: apios esquirolii
intro: Apios esquirolii, also known as the Chinese potato or wild potato, is a perennial vine native to China and Southeast Asia. It is a type of legume that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Apios esquirolii include its ability to lower cholesterol and blood pressure, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve digestion. Apios esquirolii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
